description_long: This nightstand is crafted from a material resembling white marble, giving it a luxurious and solid appearance. It features a rectangular tabletop with a large, round mirror mounted at the back, flanked by two vertical supports. The front face includes two drawers, each with a small round knob, and a central open cubby for additional storage. The legs are straight and blocky, providing a sturdy base, and the overall design is minimalist with clean lines and no visible decorative carvings. The marble texture is consistent throughout, with subtle gray veining visible on all surfaces. The mirror is set into the structure, and the handles are simple, round knobs that blend with the overall aesthetic.
description: A white marble-textured nightstand with a round mirror, two drawers with round knobs, and a central open cubby, supported by straight block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round mirror, two drawers with round knobs, and a central open cubby.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop, the thickness of the mirror, and the straight block leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mirror and the solid, unadorned back panel of the nightstand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the features of view 1, emphasizing the marble texture and blocky leg structure.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
